datasets.notes: Public Zenodo distribution with raw patches, masks, and ROI files. Best semantic fit for the current unit-cell Jaccard line, but practical conversion needs a mask-image decoder that is not yet part of the repo.
datasets.title: NuInsSeg

datasets.notes: Public challenge data page exposes training/testing downloads. XML polygon annotations are easier to integrate immediately without adding image dependencies.
